title: DuraView
description: A lightweight HUD mod that displays real-time durability for your armor and items.
body:
**DuraView**

DuraView is a lightweight client-side mod that provides a clean and intuitive way to monitor your equipment's durability in real-time.
## Features
- Real-time Durability Display: Shows durability bars for all equipped armor pieces and held items
- Clean HUD Design: Minimalist interface that doesn't clutter your screen
- Color-coded Warnings: Bars change color as durability decreases (green → yellow → red)
- Fully Customizable: Adjust position, size, and toggle individual elements via the config screen
- Easy Access: Open the configuration menu with a simple key press (default: K)
- Lightweight Performance: Minimal impact on game performance
- Client-side Only: No server installation required
## How It Works
DuraView displays durability information directly on your HUD, making it easy to see when your equipment needs repair at a glance. The mod automatically detects all equipped items and updates the display in real-time as you play.

Press K (configurable) to open the settings menu where you can:
- Toggle HUD on/off
- Adjust the position of the display
- Change the size of durability bars
## Perfect For
- Players who want to avoid unexpected equipment breakage
- Survival mode enthusiasts who need to manage resources carefully
- Anyone who prefers visual feedback over checking inventory manually

All my mods are completely free to use.
If you'd like to support development, consider buying me a coffee!
